name: Patty Ann's Filled Butter Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light in color.
3. Gradually add flour and salt, mixing until combined.
4. Chill the dough for a short period.
5. Roll out the dough between wax paper sheets at an 8-millimeter thickness (1/8 inch).
6. Cut cookies using a 2-5/8-inch cookie cutter.
7. Remove the centers from half of the cookies using a thimble or by hand.
8. Bake all cookies on ungreased baking sheets in the oven preheated to 400 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Cool the cookies on wire racks.
10. Spread whole cookies with preserves, piling higher in the center.
11. Place a cookie ring on top and sprinkle with sugar.
12. Store the filled butter rings in a tin box, separating layers with wax paper.
